about.title: ABOUT LIVEMAKERS
about.intro: LiveMakers is the institutional-grade Cardano and Midnight research arm of SITION Group.
about.sipoBody: DRep #13 (₳101M delegated). Three Cardano stake pools (SIPO/SIPO2/SIPO3). Midnight Ambassador since April 2026.
about.processBody: Research compiled from Koios, DefiLlama, CoinGecko, and GitHub. Weekly Brief authored by SIPO, translated with Claude, reviewed before publication.
about.disclaimerBody: Not investment advice. For institutional research purposes only.
